---
# Process tree: parent to child via the causality chain

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Parent/child relationships use the causality fields: `causality_actor_process_image_name` is the chain root/parent, `actor_process_image_name` the spawned child. Grouping the two reveals suspicious lineage like `cyserver.exe -> powershell.exe` or `winword.exe -> cmd.exe`. (`causality_actor_*` is the chain, `actor_*` the immediate acting process, `action_*` the target.)

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| comp count() as c by causality_actor_process_image_name, actor_process_image_name
| sort desc c
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window); measured ~0.0005 CU. Narrow the time window + filter early to keep real-dataset hunts cheap._
